Colours of MAATI - Handpainted stories from Madhubani - Jun 05
description: Concept Note: At MAATI – The Crafts School, we see craft as more than heritage. It is a language of material intelligence, cultural memory, and contemporary possibility. Through artisan-led learning, design mentorship, and enterprise development in the heart of Mithila, MAATI works alongside over 150 women artisans, ensuring the craft continues to evolve with dignity, relevance, and economic independence. We invite you to discover a curated and designed presentation of textile collections from Mithila, thoughtfully designed for contemporary homes, spaces, and collectors. Day One | 5 June 2026 An exclusive, invitation-only preview for architects, interior designers, hospitality partners, retailers, collectors, and institutional buyers—offering an opportunity to explore collections closely, discuss bespoke requirements, and initiate meaningful collaborations. Day Two | 6 June 2026 Open to all, the showcase welcomes those who value thoughtful making—to discover handcrafted collections, acquire one-of-a-kind pieces, and place custom-made orders rooted in material authenticity. More than an exhibition, this is a space for dialogue, discovery, and exchange—where craft is experienced not as heritage alone, but as a language for contemporary life. Contact number for event related enquiries - +91-8140037301
